name: dfin-financial-mcp
description: dfin.pro MCP for Fundamental Research - source-grounded SEC filings, financial statements, ratios, stock context, fund/ETF analytics, transcripts, reports, and a fundamentals screener for AI agents.

interface.shortDescription: Source-grounded financial research tools for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to the dfin.pro MCP server for source-grounded company research, SEC filings, financial statements, ratios, transcripts, reports, stock context, fund and ETF analytics, and fundamentals screening.
defaultPrompt: Research a company using dfin.pro MCP tools.
Compare peers with source-grounded financial data.
Find filing, transcript, or report evidence with dfin.pro.
